contradictions.claim_text: Nobody does sector-specialized French plus INFPC co-funding positioning.
contradictions.resolution: Drop the exclusivity positioning. Luxembourg already has public professional and workplace-oriented French providers, and the co-funding route is generic rather than unique to this product.
contradictions.why_it_matters: The old wedge would misstate the market and hide the real requirement: prove curriculum differentiation.

falsification_searches.query: Luxembourg professional French workplace training Prolingua INLL Allingua
falsification_searches.result: Contradicted by public Prolingua, INLL, and Allingua pages.
Official STATEC figures support raw workforce numbers, but not the exact legacy 228K / 47% wording without denominator cleanup.
